forbiddenCapabilities: parallel Deal, Lot or Organization authority
Float or double precision for commodity quantities, conversions or quality values
destructive down migration or deletion of published history
browser, static or in-memory registry authority
NestJS command/API activation in this schema slice
Prisma model completion claim before schema.prisma sync and generate acceptance
reference profile presented as current statutory rule
external FGIS, EDO, bank or registry live claim
acceptance: three PostgreSQL authority tables are created without changing Deal or Lot models
six archetypes are constrained in the stable profile identity
version starts in DRAFT and published content is immutable
SHA-256 metadata is mandatory and stale content hash is denied
approved and effective ranges cannot overlap under concurrent sessions
per-profile advisory lock avoids optional extension dependency
transition receipts are profile-consistent, chained and append-only
forced RLS exposes ordinary reads only for currently effective versions and reserves writes for privileged server context
machine-readable evidence and SHA-256 inventory are retained for 90 days
